response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack experience and some developer-tooling exposure (CI/CD setup, test runners, MCP code generators, Selenium course), but the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership tenure, no mobile-platform ecosystem ownership, and no organizational-change leadership. The role explicitly requires 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, neither of which is demonstrated. Candidate would be a stretch hire as a manager despite solid IC credentials.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and backend with 13+ years of experience
Direct developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure work: custom test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD setup, MCP code generators
Demonstrated knowledge sharing via workshops, courses, and talks (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos, FOSS4G)
concerns: No explicit people-management or direct-report leadership experience listed — all titles are individual-contributor
No mobile-platform ecosystem ownership (iOS/Android tooling at scale) — only brief iOS/Apple TV app maintenance in 2015-16
No evidence of leading organizational change or setting team roadmaps/performance expectations
